_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: All the models are characterized by good internal specificity (TNR), recognizing the A state in a range between 78 and 92% of the inhibitor-free trajectories...sensitivity (TPR) differs more among the models, identifying state I in a range between the 55 and 95%
details: ML models built using MATLAB achieved specificity (TNR) values ranging from 0.78-0.95 and sensitivity (TPR) values from 0.55-0.95 in internal validation
